always_avoid: Grapefruit or grapefruit juice — CRITICAL interaction with Ticagrelor and Pitavastatin
Trans fats, vanaspati, dalda, hydrogenated oils
High-sodium packaged foods with more than 400mg sodium per serving
Added sugar, refined carbs, maida in excess
Raw cruciferous vegetables at the same meal as Thyroxin
Soy products at Thyroxin meal time
Very high-fat single meals near Ticagrelor dose time
Excessive red meat — more than 2 times per week
Alcohol — patient has completely stopped, reinforce if any appears
always_encourage: Omega-3 rich foods: flaxseed, walnuts, fatty fish (with cardiologist clearance for supplements)
Colourful vegetables for polyphenols and antioxidants
Whole grains: oats, millets, brown rice, jowar, bajra
Legumes: dal, rajma, chana — excellent fiber and plant protein
Turmeric with black pepper — curcumin and piperine synergy
Garlic and onion — allicin is heart protective
Magnesium-rich foods: pumpkin seeds, leafy greens, almonds
Fermented foods: curd, kanji, idli, dosa — supports gut microbiome

supplements_to_track.name: Cobadex CZS Tablet
supplements_to_track.note: Doctor prescribed. Take after lunch at 1:30 PM every day.
